name: TARGETPAIRS_FIRST_APPEARANCE_IN_YEAR
description: List all target pairs whose first-ever patent publication year equals the given year.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH tp, min(y.year) AS first_year
WHERE first_year = $year
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, first_year
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 50;

examples: Which target pairs first appeared in 2024?
